purpose: Inventory of local resource and private-media assets intentionally excluded from normal Cloudflare Pages staging, with non-secret restoration targets.

summary.preferredRestoration: R2 or authenticated Pages Functions download routes; keep originals out of default Pages static uploads

driftDetection.policy: Fail the audit when local restorable groups, counts, bytes, ignore coverage, or extension counts drift from this manifest.

assets.title: qi classroom replay 01 static fallback

postRestoreChecks.auth: authenticated session required; do not store cookie values
postRestoreChecks.expected: 200 JSON with sources.r2=true, or sources.kv=true only for the documented fallback

postRestoreChecks.auth: authenticated session required; do not store cookie values
postRestoreChecks.expected: 206 response with X-Private-Video-Store set to r2 or kv

driftDetection.failureMeaning: Local static fallback chunk inventory changed; update media restore sizing and confirm privacy policy before any restore.

restoration.preferred: Upload the original MP4 as a single private R2 object at private/qi/meeting_01.mp4, then verify the authenticated status API reports sources.r2=true.
restoration.alternate: Use the teacher/admin private-video upload path so metadata lands in FM_AUDIT and chunks land in FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA using private/videos/<id>/chunks/chunk-0000.bin keys.
restoration.emergencyStaticFallback: Temporarily include private-media/qi-meeting-01 in a one-off Pages staging package only when R2/KV is unavailable and the privacy risk is explicitly accepted.
restoration.doNot: Do not remove the private-media/** ignore rules for normal deploys.

verification: Authenticated GET /api/private-videos/qi-meeting-01/status shows sources.r2=true or sources.kv=true.
Authenticated ranged GET /api/private-videos/qi-meeting-01/stream returns 206 and X-Private-Video-Store is r2 or kv.

assets.title: Fluid mechanics PPT/DOCX source originals

files.title: 流体运动的基本方程组
理想不可压缩流体无旋运动
流体力学课程笔记文档
中国海洋大学流体力学 2000-2024 历年真题

postRestoreChecks.auth: authenticated session required; do not store cookie values
postRestoreChecks.expected: 200 response with Content-Length matching the manifest bytes for each restored original
source_download_allowed audit event emitted for each original download
401 or 403; original source bytes are not public by default

driftDetection.failureMeaning: Fluid source originals changed; regenerate derived indexes and update R2 key/upload checklist before restoration.

restoration.preferred: Keep derived Markdown/JSON public in Pages; put originals in R2 and add a protected source-download route that preserves the existing authentication and audit behavior.
restoration.staticHosting: Only acceptable for a deliberate one-off if every original is intended to be downloadable from static Pages assets.

verification: Authenticated download route returns the expected Content-Length for each original.
source_download_allowed audit event is emitted for each original download.
Unauthenticated requests to originals are blocked.

assets.title: Physical oceanography PPT originals

files.path: resources/physical-oceanography/ppt/物理海洋学复试教学串讲_学生挖空点击显答案版.pptx
resources/physical-oceanography/ppt/物理海洋学复试教学串讲_学生挖空版.pptx
resources/physical-oceanography/ppt/物理海洋学复试教学串讲_学生挖空答案版.pptx
resources/physical-oceanography/ppt/物理海洋学导论_学生挖空点击显答案版.pptx
resources/physical-oceanography/ppt/物理海洋学导论_学生挖空版.pptx

restorationTarget.auditEvent: source_download_allowed when protected downloads are enabled

postRestoreChecks.expected: Derived pages or generated public artifacts remain the primary student-facing path before any PPTX original is restored

postRestoreChecks.auth: authenticated session required if a protected original-download route is enabled
postRestoreChecks.expected: No public static PPTX URL is introduced; any future original route has auth and audit parity with /resources/fluid-sources/

driftDetection.failureMeaning: Physical oceanography PPT originals changed; refresh the derived-page plan and protected-download decision before restoration.

restoration.preferred: Convert to derived HTML/Markdown/data where possible and keep PPTX originals in source storage or R2.
restoration.protectedDownloadOption: If originals need student downloads, extend the protected source-download route to this prefix and audit it.
restoration.staticHosting: Use static hosting only if these decks are intentionally public and no download audit is required.

verification: Confirm the physical-oceanography pages link to derived assets first.
If downloads are enabled, verify auth and audit parity with /resources/fluid-sources/.

assets.title: Fluid mechanics exam archive DOCX

restorationTarget.auditEvent: source_download_allowed when protected downloads are enabled

postRestoreChecks.expected: Derived Markdown archive remains accessible from Pages

postRestoreChecks.auth: authenticated session required if the original DOCX download route is enabled
postRestoreChecks.expected: No public static DOCX URL is introduced; any future original route is authenticated and audited

driftDetection.failureMeaning: Exam archive source DOCX changed; confirm the derived Markdown remains sufficient or update the protected-object-store plan.

restoration.preferred: Serve the derived Markdown archive from Pages and keep the DOCX source in the repo or protected object storage.
restoration.protectedDownloadOption: Map to R2 key protected-sources/fluid-mechanics/exam-archives/ouc-fluid-mechanics-2000-2024-complete.docx if an original download is required.
restoration.staticHosting: Not recommended while the Markdown derivative is sufficient.

verification: Derived Markdown remains accessible from the site.
Any original DOCX download route is authenticated and audited.

nonGoals: No upload, bucket creation, KV mutation, or Pages deployment is implied by this manifest.
This manifest does not relax .assetsignore; normal Pages staging should keep these assets excluded.
